mapper.select: SELECT ar.id AS ai_review_id, ar.question_id, ar.box_user_id, ar.content, COALESCE(lc.like_count, 0) AS like_count FROM ai_reviews ar JOIN questions q ON q.id = ar.question_id LEFT JOIN like_counts lc ON lc.target_type = 'AI_REVIEW' AND lc.target_id = ar.id WHERE ar.status = 'SUCCEEDED' AND ar.content IS NOT NULL AND q.status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY CASE WHEN ar.box_user_id = #{boxUserId} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, COALESCE(lc.like_count, 0) DESC, ar.completed_at DESC NULLS LAST, ar.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
